posts.author: juanmaldonado (Juan Maldonado)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Columns with rollup enabled should be supported in the Formula Builder.

What are you trying to achieve

The goal is to use any valid cell value from an item inside a the Formula builder, even though its in a column with rollup enabled.
i.e:
Col1(w/ rollup) | Col2 | Formula
5 | 2 | {Col1(w/ rollup)}*{Col2} //Result should be 10
For this case, the Formula builder triggers an error “Unsupported column with calculation: Col1(w/ rollup)”
